title: Significant Problem, Public Value, and Durable Need · Mastery Review
summary: A review board compares near-miss decisions for significant problem, public value, and durable need and accepts only observable behavior, human evidence, explicit non-claims, and owned transfer gates. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for significance and public-value case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Triangulate direct research, domain artifacts, credible data, existing services, and counterevidence to establish problem significance.
Bound affected populations, contexts, frequency, severity, unequal burden, and who is missing from available evidence.
Study current services, manual workarounds, nonuse, competitors, public infrastructure, and build-nothing options.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# capstone-project cumulative independent product evidence portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic evidence-contract review only.
# They never contact participants or services, execute commands, deploy, or claim live conformance.
workspace: portfolio
project-id: capstone-project
stakeholder: [replace with affected people and accountable decision owner]
decision: [replace with the decision this evidence changes]
problem-evidence: [replace with observed need, counterevidence, and uncertainty]
accessibility: [replace with keyboard, structure, reflow, status, alternatives, and human review]
security: [replace with threat, authorization, abuse, response, and residual risk]
privacy: [replace with purpose, minimization, retention, access, correction, and deletion]
test-strategy: [replace with behavior, changed case, fault, accessibility, security, and recovery]
release-evidence: [replace with revision, artifact, inventory, provenance, validation, and rollback]
recovery: [replace with backup, clean restore, reconciliation, communication, and ownership]
portfolio-proof: [replace with contribution, limitations, counterexample, and unseen defense]
transfer-boundary: authorized controlled research, toolchain, deployment, and review environments
evidence:

steps.title: Significance Evidence · changed case · Quiz Significance Evidence
steps.instruction:
quiz case — A novel technical demonstration lacks durable need evidence, reachable affected people, current alternatives, or a causal route to public value. The quiz variation 2 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: defend one bounded product claim

Which action demonstrates Significance Evidence without dropping earlier contracts?

Evidence target: Significance Evidence · changed case · Quiz Significance Evidence.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for triangulate direct research, domain artifacts, credible data, existing services, and counterevidence to establish problem significance. For Significance Evidence · changed case · Quiz Significance Evidence, keep Significance Evidence connected to mechanically reviewable stakeholder, affected-user, artifact, changed-case, failure, repair, release, recovery, and transfer decision evidence.

content.text: A novel technical demonstration lacks durable need evidence, reachable affected people, current alternatives, or a causal route to public value. The quiz variation 2 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: defend one bounded product claim

content.title: Commit before feedback
content.text: Choose from the stated data before opening the worked model. Record which Significance Evidence condition decided your prediction.

content.label: Authority to consult after committing
content.value: GOV.UK Service Manual discovery and alpha guidance — Controls problem-first discovery, affected-user and constraint research, measures of success, riskiest-assumption prototypes, and evidence-based stop decisions before production building.

hints: For Significance Evidence · changed case · Quiz Significance Evidence, name the types, ownership, and stop path, Significance Evidence precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At Significance Evidence · changed case · Quiz Significance Evidence, trace this concrete input and predict values, errors, blocking, and output before reviewing it: A novel technical demonstration lacks durable need evidence, reachable affected people, current alternatives, or a causal route to public value. The quiz variation 2 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: defend one bounded product claim

For Significance Evidence · changed case · Quiz Significance Evidence, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: Novel technology makes the addressed problem significant.

options.text: For significance evidence · changed case, apply Significance Evidence without its stated preconditions, omit the significance and public-value case trace and counterexample, and treat one plausible output as complete proof. This does not satisfy Significance Evidence for significance and public-value case.

Triangulate direct research, domain artifacts, credible data, existing services, and counterevidence to establish problem significance. Apply it to the stated input and retain a reproducible trace for significance and public-value case.
Novel technology makes the addressed problem significant. That claim fails the significance evidence · changed case evidence boundary for Significance Evidence.

steps.title: Defend one difficult decision · Quiz Durability Change
steps.instruction:
Write the quiz evidence note for Durability Change: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A novel technical demonstration lacks durable need evidence, reachable affected people, current alternatives, or a causal route to public value. The quiz variation 4 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Test whether the need persists under policy, market, technology, organizational, and behavior change across the project horizon.

Evidence target: Defend one difficult decision · Quiz Durability Change.
steps.why: Retrieving Durability Change through the concrete significance and public-value case case exposes causal gaps that recognition alone can hide. For Defend one difficult decision · Quiz Durability Change, keep Durability Change connected to mechanically reviewable stakeholder, affected-user, artifact, changed-case, failure, repair, release, recovery, and transfer decision evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Test whether the need persists under policy, market, technology, organizational, and behavior change across the project horizon.
